```{.r .cell-code}
UFOData <- read.csv("Data/ufo_sightings.csv")
head(UFOData)
```

:::
:::

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
# Sightings by state

Sightings <- UFOData |>
  filter (Location.Country == "US") |>
  select(c(
    Country = Location.Country,
    State = Location.State,
    City = Location.City,
    ufoShape = Data.Shape,
    dateYear = Dates.Sighted.Year,
    dateMonth = Dates.Sighted.Month,
    dateDay = Date.Sighted.Day,
    timeHour = Dates.Sighted.Hour,
    timeMinute = Dates.Sighted.Minute,
    dateDocumentedYear = Dates.Documented.Year,
    dateDocumentedMonth = Dates.Documented.Month,
    dateDocumentedDay = Dates.Documented.Day
  ))
head(Sightings)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
  Country State         City ufoShape dateYear dateMonth dateDay timeHour
1      US    AK anchor point     disk     2005         5      24       18
2      US    AK    anchorage changing     2000        12      31       21
3      US    AK    anchorage changing     2006        10      23       21

5      US    AK    anchorage   circle     2011        10      21       21
```

:::
:::

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
SightingsCount <- Sightings |> group_by(State) |> count(dateDecade = round(dateYear, -1), sort=TRUE)
SightingsCount
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
# A tibble: 359 × 3
# Groups:   State [51]
   State dateDecade     n
   <chr>      <dbl> <int>
 1 CA          2010  4600
 2 CA          2000  3028

 4 WA          2010  1882
 5 TX          2010  1791

10 OH          2010  1241
# ℹ 349 more rows
```


:::
:::

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
# Basic col plot to show count of sightings per state
statesPlot <- ggplot(
  SightingsCount, 
  aes(x = n, y = reorder(State, n), fill = dateDecade)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.7) +
  labs(
    title = "UFO Sightings by State",
    x = "Number of Sightings",
    y = "State",
    fill = "Year",
    caption = "data from CORGIS.edu"
  )
statesPlot
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](UFOs_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-4-1.png){width=672}
:::
:::

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
shapesPlot <- Sightings |> ggplot(aes(y = ufoShape)) +
  geom_bar()
shapesPlot
```
